# flashduty Provider

The Flashduty provider is used to interact with Flashduty API resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    flashduty = {
      source = "flashcatcloud/flashduty"
    }
  }
}

provider "flashduty" {
  # APP key can be set via FLASHDUTY_APP_KEY environment variable
  # app_key = "your-app-key"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `app_key` (String, Sensitive) The APP Key for Flashduty API. Can be obtained from Flashduty Console -> Account Settings -> APP Key. Can also be set via `FLASHDUTY_APP_KEY` environment variable.
- `base_url` (String) The base URL for Flashduty API. Defaults to `https://api.flashcat.cloud`. Can also be set via `FLASHDUTY_BASE_URL` environment variable.
